value.found_quote: Remote connections let you use Codex from another device or another machine... Start new threads in projects on the host, or continue existing ones. Send follow-up instructions, answer questions, and steer active work. Approve commands and other actions. Review outputs, diffs, test results, terminal output, and screenshots. Get notified when Codex completes a task or needs your attention. Switch between connected hosts and threads.
value.name: Remote connections
